payload.title: Workspace-aware `trust check` — one command, no manual TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH
payload.description: Reviewer had to inject #![strict] into a temp copy of all 23 files in a shell loop because `trust check` is single-file. Want: `trust check` that walks Cargo.toml, resolves modules across a crate/workspace, and auto-builds the dependency signature index (instead of manual `trust index` + TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH) so it's CI-usable in one command. Crate-wide checking already happens inside the trust-rustc wrapper (collect_crate_callees); lift that resolution into a standalone walk for the CLI.
